title: A Few Bullets More
writer: Lucio Fulci, Julio Buchs, Federico De Urrutia
actors: Peter Lee Lawrence, Fausto Tozzi, Dyanik Zurakowska
plot: Billy becomes innocently an outlaw while protecting his mother, but then turns into a trigger happy killer. When he falls in love he tries with the help of Pat Garrett, a fatherly friend, to change back. However, circumstances for...
